content.title: Open in...Fredy ;)
content.text:
With the latest version of Fredy, every notification now comes with a link that opens the listing directly inside Fredy. This is also a key step toward an upcoming...milestone :).
To make this work, Fredy needs to know where it lives on the network. We try to guess the public base URL, but let’s be honest, you probably know better. Take a quick look at the baseUrl in the system settings and fix it if it looks off.
